pages.title: Excalidraw
pages.content:
# Excalidraw

Your drawings are saved in your browser's storage. 
Browser storage can be cleared unexpectedly. 
Save your work to a file regularly to avoid losing it.

Open

Ctrl+O

Help

?

Live collaboration...

[Sign up](https://plus.excalidraw.com/plus?utm_source=excalidraw&utm_medium=app&utm_content=welcomeScreenGuest)

Export, preferences, languages, ...

Pick a tool & Start drawing!

To move canvas, hold Scroll wheel or Space while dragging, or use the hand tool

## Shapes

2

3

4

5

6

7

8

9

0

## Canvas actions

100%

Shortcuts & help

Exit zen mode

Drawing canvas

pages.title: Excalidraw developer docs
pages.content:
[Skip to main content](https://docs.excalidraw.com/#docusaurus_skipToContent_fallback)

[**Excalidraw**](https://docs.excalidraw.com/) [Docs](https://docs.excalidraw.com/docs) [Blog](https://plus.excalidraw.com/blog)

[GitHub](https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw)

SearchK

[**Excalidraw**](https://docs.excalidraw.com/)

- [Docs](https://docs.excalidraw.com/docs)
- [Blog](https://plus.excalidraw.com/blog)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw)

← Back to main menu

# Excalidraw developer docs

For Excalidraw contributors or those integrating the Excalidraw editor

[Get started](https://docs.excalidraw.com/docs)

### Learn how Excalidraw works

Want to contribute to Excalidraw but got lost in the codebase?

### Integrate Excalidraw

Want to build your own app powered by Excalidraw but don't know where to start?

### Help us improve

Are the docs missing something? Anything you had trouble understanding or needs an explanation? Come contribute to the docs to make them even better!

Docs

- [Get Started](https://docs.excalidraw.com/docs)

Community

- [Discord](https://discord.gg/UexuTaE)
- [𝕏](https://x.com/excalidraw)
- [Linkedin](https://www.linkedin.com/company/excalidraw)

More

- [Blog](https://plus.excalidraw.com/blog)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/excalidraw/excalidraw)

Copyright © 2023 Excalidraw community. Built with Docusaurus ❤️
